description:
Create a plain-text summary report for the 'Fells Loop' track located in 'My Collection' in Garmin BaseCamp. Save the report to C:\workspace\track_report.txt using the following format:

Track Name: [name as shown in BaseCamp]
Distance: [value] [unit: mi or km]
Track Points: [number]
Start Latitude: [decimal degrees]
Start Longitude: [decimal degrees]
